Taste of Tradition,
Made with Love

Authentic homemade achar, pickle, masala & namak crafted from recipes passed down by our beloved Nana Nani. Every product carries the ghar jaisa warmth of tradition — the essence of real, organic Indian flavours your childhood remembers.

The Love Behind Every Product 🫶

Reminisce the taste of nana-nani ka ghar — those golden garmi ki chhutiyan afternoons, the smell of homemade achar drying in the sun, organic masala being ground by hand. Our Nana and Nani spent decades perfecting these recipes in their humble Indore kitchen. Every product carries those old memories and the authentic, ghar jaisa flavour of childhood.

Our Story

A tale of tradition, love, and authentic flavours passed down through generations

The Essence of Nana Nani

In every Indian household, the warmth of love is felt most vividly in the kitchen. Our brand name, Nana Nani (maternal grandparents), embodies this very essence — the smell of homemade achar, organic masala being ground by hand, and that ghar jaisa taste of authentic pickle and namak that brings back childhood memories of nana-nani ka ghar.

We believe food is more than sustenance — it is a connection to our roots, our culture, and our heritage. Every achar, pickle, masala and namak we craft follows traditional Indore methods, uses authentic organic ingredients, and carries forward the homemade goodness of garmi ki chhutiyan and old memories that defined our childhoods.

❦ ❦ ❦

Our Values

What makes Nana Nani special

Made with Love

Every product is crafted with the same love and care our cooking tradition demands.

100% Natural

No artificial preservatives, colours, or additives. Just pure, authentic ingredients.

Family Traditions

Recipes passed down through generations, preserving the authentic taste of tradition.

Quality Assured

Every batch is prepared with utmost care to ensure the highest quality and taste.

❦ ❦ ❦

Our Product Range

Traditional Achars (Pickles)

Our signature pickles – from tangy mango to spicy red chilli – are made using time-tested recipes and the finest ingredients. Each variety offers a unique burst of flavours that complements every meal.

  • Aam Ka Achar
  • Lal Mirch Ka Achar
  • Hari Mirch Ka Achar
  • Amla Ka Achar
  • Nimbu Ka Achar
  • Indori Jeeravan Masala
  • Mitkoor Masala

Magic Masalas

Our special dry powder blends can be quickly prepared with water and oil to create delicious chutneys and sauces. Perfect for busy households that don't want to compromise on taste.

Masala Namak

Our signature spiced salt is a versatile blend perfect for salads, curd, spicy drinks, and various dishes. It adds that special touch that transforms ordinary food into something extraordinary.

Perfect for:
  • Salads and Raita
  • Fresh Fruits
  • Chaas and Lassi
  • Street-style Chaat

Experience the Taste of Tradition

Let Nana Nani bring the warmth and authenticity of traditional recipes to your table.
